feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Add attribute Account assignment group by customer like field on market segment report
entry.content:
Hi,

I would need to add Account assignment group by customer as a field in the market segment report so that I can be able to filter the data based on this characteristic.

I can add  Account assignment group by customer field as attribute from sales order field, but in this way i can't use this information to filter data.

 

Regards

entry.title: Balance Sheet/Income Statement Custom S4HC ?
entry.content:
I have a custom request for the balance sheet/income statement report column to be made monthly.

is it possible to customize? If not, can you create a new application for the custom report? Thank You.

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public edition Trial missing Communication Management tab
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to use the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Trial (14 days trial: https://www.sap.com/products/erp/s4hana/trial.html) to integrate with a SAP BTP trial account to try out an extension app scenario.

In the registration step 1 mentioned in https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/sap-business-technology-platform/trigger-registration-in-sap-s-4hana-cloud-tenant there is no Communication Management tab (and hence no "Maintain Extensions on SAP BTP" tile) in the SAP S/4HANA trial cloud tenant.

Is this not supported in the SAP S/4HANA trial account ? Are there any plans of enabling this so that one can try out extension scenarios or is there already an alternative?

Regards,

Mel

entry.title: Number Ranges for In-House Repair
entry.content:
Dear Community,

we are planning to restructure the Number Ranges for Sales and Billing in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud and we also want to start using the In-House Repair Process.

The issue is now that we are using for Sales Documents the same numbers as the In-House Repair documents. But is seems like it is not the same number range since the numbers are different.

Is there any option to define the number ranges for In-House Repair documents?
Unfortunately I was not able to find a way to customize that.

 

Thank you in advance!

Kind regards,

Jonas

entry.title: Basic Withholding Tax (for customers) Process
entry.content:
Hello - We are in the USA and have foreign customers who withhold tax from their payments on our invoices. This causes them to pay less than we have invoiced.

I am looking for a basic best practice guide to handle this in the system.  Should tax codes be set up for these (countries, customers, materials?) so that the tax is recognized, and the amount sitting in A/R will match the payment when it comes in?

Do we not do any such configuration, and there is a method to post the short payment, and any difference to withholding tax to clear the item?  

I have struggled to find any clear documentation in the help. Most seems to speak about supplier side withholding tax, or already be deep into complexities - just looking for the basic initial setup and best practice process.

entry.title: Update plant in VA02
entry.content:
Hi,

 

Is there a BAdI available in SAP Cloud that could help update the sales order's delivering plant?

I checked Business Add-Ins | SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition | SAP Business Accelerator Hub and found nothing that could edit specifically the delivery plant at item level.

 

Thanks

entry.title: MRP Run Process with Delayed sales order with MTS (40) Strategy Group
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

What are the better solutions for the exclude the old sales order from current MRP run without completing  Sales line items?

if sales requirement not deliver as per requested date it should be deliver next delivery date or need to be re-arrange the sales delivery date based on delivery plan , but some time it will not practice in system and it will be impacted for the Production planning cycle on daily , please let me know if have any susses story if you have experience  related to this , and let me know few insight with your experience  

Thanks

Lalith P

Thanks

entry.title: Time-Dependent Days of Supply.
entry.content:
The settings have been configured as follows, But "Checking the Safety Stock in the Stock/Requirements List" screen can't see there are three lines representing the Time-Dependent Safety Stock.

1.The material master is set to Time-Dependent Days of Supply.

2.In Maintain Time-Dependent Stock Levels, an interval has been added using Add.

entry.title: Upload functionality for debit/credit material (MR22)
entry.content: Apps "Manage material valuaiton" provides the function "Debit/Credit Material" but i can't find  upload functionality.  The MR22 upload functionality is useful during inventory data migration with scope item 33Q(Actual costing). Is there any workaround or will it release in the near future.

entry.title: Unable to connect BAS to S4HANA Public Cloud system
entry.content:
Hello ,

I am trying to connect BAS to a S4HANA public cloud system using SAML assertion destination , by following tutorial : Connect SAP Business Application Studio and SAP S/4HANA Cloud System 

In destination cockpit the destination connects successfully . However , when I am trying to connect to the system ( saml destination ) in BAS ( using adaption project ) , I am getting following error : The system that you have selected cannot be detected to be of type OnPremise or of type CloudReady. You should select system of either of both types in order to continue with the generation of the project.

Is there any configuration that I am missing in the S4HANA cloud system .

entry.title: Looking for a list of master data objects which are covered on the MDG Cloud edition
entry.content:
I am looking for a list of master data objects which are covered in MDG Cloud Edition, showing what is covered in Public cloud and what is covered in Private cloud.

Is there any documentation which can provide me these details?

entry.title: slow-moving indicator - wrong value
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

during SAP public cloud implementation we found differences in Slow or Non-moving materials app.

Based on the SAP help https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/32da8359c8ee4e8b8e8c5e15cacba5aa/276b1b645ec64e808e430b363d6efd6b.html?profile=20087413&source=productlink-webassistant the value for slow-moving indicator should be 5,49. But in the system, we have value 5,14.

Qcons = 45

Qstock = 19955

NOdays = 15

 

Do you have any ideas about what could cause these differences?

entry.title: I need to send the information displayed by the app "monitor purchase order item" via email?
entry.content:
Hello. I need to send the information displayed by the app "monitor purchase order item" like a report via email, it's possible?

Regards.

SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud

entry.title: Rounding Profile is not coming up
entry.content:
Hello Members, 

I am executing Scope Item J45 (Procurement of Direct Materials), and setting up Rounding Profile via CBC. It seems that Rounding Profile ZT01 has been created because when I type the value below and click [Static] button then the error message shows up.

However, there are no matching items on Purchasing Info Record. 

Are there any further steps that I have to execute to show up the settings?

Best,

entry.title: How to download dunning reminder
entry.content:
Hello Members,

I am executing Scope Item J45(Procurement of Direct Materials) and want to download Dunning Reminder. However, the status is [In Preparation] and PDF mark is not available. 

Thank you in advance for your help

entry.title: SSCUI 102336 doesn't exist on CBC
entry.content:
I am following a video from ( https://microlearning.opensap.com/media/Workflow+for+Payment+Approval+-+SAP+S+4HANA+Cloud/1_440d7me3 ). But I stopped because the video was configured with SSCUI 102336 Settings for Payment Approval Processes / Define Settings for Bank Account Master Data and after I searched for SSCUI 102336 it wasn't there on CBC.

then I found out via Google https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3130880 which told me I had to add business catalog ID SAP_CA_BC_IC_LND_FIN_CM0_PC under BPC_EXPERT,

and I did it but SSCUI 102336 still didn't appear on CBC.

Thank You

entry.title: Data loss occured when converting 2024 Error
entry.content:
Hi everyone,when im executing "journalentrybulkclearingreques"API in Public Cloud system,im getting error message given below.Does anyone know the cause of this error.

Regards,

entry.title: Job template “Production Settlement in Parallel Ledgers” is not available
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are working on Bolt Testing in SAP Cloud Tenant for the test script BEI Period End Closing – Plant. While doing the step (Schedule Production Settlement in Parallel Ledgers), we have to create a new product costing job named “Production Settlement in Parallel Ledgers” in “Schedule Product Costing Jobs” application and the job template “Production Settlement in Parallel Ledgers” is not available in the list. we have attached the screenshot of the error.

Can you please help with this?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Dear Experts
entry.content:
We are using SAP S/4 HANA Cloud and needs to know what replaced tramsaction ME54N, We needs to know this app in SAP Hana Coud for our BPO be able to approve PR's on behalf of users who are unable to approve or did not set up substitutes. We have been using this transaction ME54N duiring time when we were still on SAP ECC.
Thanks
Gauta Makgopya

entry.title: Incoming EHF invoices
entry.content:
Hello,

We have some questions regarding incoming EHF invoices entering SAP. Currently we have an integration solution that generates three different statuses in SAP, which are the following

 

1. Posted PO invoice (goods receipt must have been completed due to the GR/IV flag on POs
2. Parked PO invoice (goods receipt has not been completed or there are additional items on the invoice that must be posted manually, e.g. shipping, pallet cost, etc.). On these invoices, the PO number is not included in the SAP standard field as it is not stored in the Purchase order field unless goods receipt has been done, so we put it in "notes" so that they can manually enter it after the GR has been carried out. This results in the invoice only containing header info when it enters SAP, no lines.
3. Parked FI invoice – all FI invoices come in as parked and must be posted manually in SAP. We only get header information into SAP and the rest can be posted manually by checking the PDF attached in SAP.

The problem is that it is not a requirement that the supplier send an invoice with attachment/PDF, and when the invoices enter SAP as above, with only header information (except on fully matched PO invoices then) it becomes problematic to know how to post the invoices when they have no attachment to look at. We receive complete information from the supplier, but right now the integration is not set up so that the information can be entered automatically into some fields in SAP, as the basic idea of the solution was that accounting would take place in SAP.  One way to manage this is to make our integration create own PDFs based on the information provided electronically, but it would be better if it could be solved in a nicer way since this would result in manual work. 
 
 
We are interested in getting to know any SAP standard/best practises for EHF management or any recommendation or experience. Appreciate all answers
